ariaSpec.usage: Announces the combobox role for the SmartBox input.
Provides an accessible label for the SmartBox (e.g., "AI-powered search").
Indicates whether the suggestion popup is currently visible.
Indicates that the SmartBox has a popup listbox with suggestions.
References the ID of the popup listbox element when the popup is open.
Indicates the autocomplete behavior of the input field.
When the popup is open and keyboard navigation is active, references the ID of the currently focused list item.
Decorative icons in the prefix area are hidden from screen readers.
Suffix buttons must have accessible labels describing their function (e.g., "Start voice input", "Send prompt").
The send button must be labelled to indicate its current action (e.g., "Send" or "Stop processing").
Indicates the button is disabled when there is no input or processing is not active.
Indicates that processing is in progress. The button changes function to stop processing.
Use a visually hidden live region to announce status changes.
Determines whether the entire region is announced on updates.

kbSpec.behavior: Opens the suggestion popup if closed, or moves focus to the next suggestion in the list.
Opens the suggestion popup if closed, or moves focus to the previous suggestion in the list.
Selects the currently highlighted suggestion (if any) and submits the input.
Closes the suggestion popup if open, or clears the input field.
When the popup is open, moves focus to the first suggestion in the list.
When the popup is open, moves focus to the last suggestion in the list.
Triggers a click action on the button (e.g., start voice input, send input, stop processing).
Moves focus to the next suggestion in the list.
Moves focus to the previous suggestion in the list.
Moves focus to the first suggestion in the list.
Moves focus to the last suggestion in the list.
Selects the focused suggestion and closes the popup.
Closes the popup and returns focus to the input field.
